allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5175/api/admin/tables?filter=MARA" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Status:" $r.StatusCode; Write-Host "Body:" $r.Content } catch { Write-Host "Hata:" $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5055/api/admin/tables?filter=MARA" -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "Status:" $r.StatusCode; Write-Host "Body \(ilk 300 kar\):" \($r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(300, $r.Content.Length\)\)\) } catch { Write-Host "Hata:" $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5055/api/admin/tables" -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Host "Status:" $r.StatusCode; Write-Host "Kayıt sayısı:" \($r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).Count } catch { Write-Host "Hata:" $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5055/api/admin/tables/MARA" -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Host "Status:" $r.StatusCode; Write-Host "Body \(ilk 500\):" \($r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $r.Content.Length\)\)\) } catch { Write-Host "Hata:" $_.Exception.Message; Write-Host "Response:" $_.Exception.Response })
